repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
paracontent_tesim: This book is endowed to Mount Sinai. May whoever takes it out from it, have his share with Judas [Iscariot]
هذا الكتاب وقف على طور سينا فمن / اخرجه منه يكون حظه مع يودس
